title: workflow targets routed to the operative's Workflow tool (compose-don't-own)

tests.summary: 6 passed — isWorkflowTarget detects type:workflow only; workflowTurnPrefix names the workflow + Workflow-tool instruction + targetId fallback; gateway-routing regression intact

suite.summary: 895 passed; 6 PRE-EXISTING failures; no new regressions

review.summary: compose-don't-own: no parallel workflow engine; a resolved workflow target prepends a Workflow-tool instruction to the operative turn so it actually runs. Pure helpers, low blast radius.

blockers.cause: external: Codex/ChatGPT workspace out of credits
blockers.observed: Your workspace is out of credits. Add credits to continue.
blockers.remediation: Add credits to the Codex workspace, then re-run the adversarial review on this slice's diff.

codexPwTest.note: independent cross-model functional pass: Codex ran the modes-arc committed suite (14/14 files, 93/93 tests) + spot-checked specs against production code for non-vacuousness. Backend slices verified via independent committed-spec execution (no running UI to Playwright-drive); s3c UI also has the dev-env walkthrough.
